headline: Robinhood Social Launch Tests Trust As Stock Trades Below Analyst Targets
summary: Robinhood Markets (NasdaqGS:HOOD) has launched a beta version of "Robinhood Social", a feature that publicly shares real trade and performance data from authenticated accounts. The new tool uses KYC based verification to link profiles to verified identities, aiming to make social trading and performance sharing more transparent inside the app. The feature is raising concerns around whether KYC alone can prevent AI generated or stolen identities from influencing socialized finance activity on...
